import useDarkMode from 'use-dark-mode'
import { ThemeProvider } from 'styled-components'
import { BrowserRouter as Router } from 'react-router-dom'
import { Provider as StoreProvider } from 'react-redux'

import { store } from './app-state'
import { AppRoutes } from './Routes'
import { lightTheme, darkTheme } from './styles/theme'
import { GlobalStyle } from './styles/GlobalStyle'

export default function App() {
  const { value } = useDarkMode(false, { global: globalThis.window })
  const theme = value ? darkTheme : lightTheme

  return (
    <Router>
      <StoreProvider store={store}>
        <ThemeProvider theme={theme}>
          <GlobalStyle />
          <AppRoutes />
        </ThemeProvider>
      </StoreProvider>
    </Router>
  )
}

import { DefaultTheme } from 'styled-components'

declare module 'styled-components' {
  export interface DefaultTheme {
    name: 'light' | 'dark'
    fonts: {
      family: string
    }
    spacing: typeof spacing
    color: typeof color
    borderRadius: typeof borderRadius
    boxShadow: typeof boxShadow
    typography: typeof typography
  }
}

const baseColors = {
  white: '#FFFFFF ',
  black: '#202020',
  red: {
    base: '#D70808',
    light1: '#E57373',
    light2: '#EF9A9A',
    dark1: '#C62828',
    dark2: '#B71C1C',
  },
  otherBlack: '#2C2C2C ',
  grey: {
    base: '#909090',
    light1: '#A6A6A6',
    light2: '#BCBCBC',
    light3: '#D2D2D2',
    light4: '#E9E9E9',
    light5: '#F5F6F7',
    light6: '#F9F9F9',
    dark1: '#797979',
    dark2: '#636363',
    dark3: '#4D4D4D',
    dark4: '#363636',
    dark5: '#2C2C2C',
    dark6: '#202020',
  },
  green: {
    base: '#E5F8BC',
    light1: '#E8F9C3',
    light2: '#EAF9C9',
    light3: '#EDFAD0',
    light4: '#EFFBD7',
    light5: '#F2FCDE',
    dark1: '#CEDFA9',
    dark2: '#B7C696',
    dark3: '#A0AE84',
    dark4: '#899571',
    dark5: '#737C5E',
  },
  blue: {
    base: '#B1DDE4',
    light1: '#B9E0E7',
    light2: '#C1E4E9',
    light3: '#C8E7EC',
    light4: '#D0EBEF',
    light5: '#D8EEF2',
    dark1: '#9FC7CD',
    dark2: '#8EB1B6',
    dark3: '#7C9BA0',
    dark4: '#6A8589',
    dark5: '#596f72',
  },
}

const spaceUnit = 1

const borderRadius = {
  xs: '4px',
  s: '8px',
  m: '16px',
  l: '24px',
  xl: '32px',
  xxl: '40px',
  round: '50%',
}

const spacing = {
  xxs: `${0.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xs: `${0.5 * spaceUnit}em`,
  s: `${spaceUnit}em`,
  m: `${1.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  l: `${2 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xl: `${3.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
  xxl: `${5.25 * spaceUnit}em`,
}

const boxShadow = {
  card: '0px 14px 26px 0px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08)',
  inner: 'inset 0 3px 0 0 rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05)',
  outerBorder: `0 0 0 1px ${baseColors.blue.dark2}, 0 0 0 4px ${baseColors.blue.light5}`,
}

const typography = {
  fontSize: {
    body: '1.125rem',
    bodyS: '1rem',
    bodyXS: '0.9rem',
    bodyXXS: '0.72rem',
    heading1: '2.74rem',
    heading2: '2.19rem',
    heading3: '1.75rem',
    heading4: '1.4rem',
  },
  fontWeight: {
    black: '900',

     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {

    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)

export const Spinner = () => {
  const { color } = useTheme()
  return (
    <StyledSVG
      xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"

      preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid"
    >
      <text transform="translate(-50 0)" fill={color.primaryText}>

      <g>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="-0.6566000000000001s"
          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="-0.3234s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"

          />
        </circle>
        <circle cx="60" cy="50" r="4" fill="#22aca7">
          <animate
            attributeName="cx"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="95;35"
            keyTimes="0;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
          <animate
            attributeName="fill-opacity"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0;1;1"
            keyTimes="0;0.2;1"
            begin="0s"
          />
        </circle>
      </g>
      <g transform="translate(-15 0)">
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de" transform="rotate(90 50 50)" />
        <path d="M50 50L20 50A30 30 0 0 0 80 50Z" fill="#61d8de">
          <animateTransform
            attributeName="transform"
            type="rotate"
            repeatCount="indefinite"
            dur="1.0204081632653061s"
            values="0 50 50;45 50 50;0 50 50"

            values="0 50 50;-45 50 50;0 50 50"
            keyTimes="0;0.5;1"
          />
        </path>
      </g>
    </StyledSVG>
  )
}

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { ShoppingCartItem } from '../ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem'
     4→import { CartItem } from '../../../app-state/cart'
     5→import { Body } from '../../typography/Body'
     6→import { toCurrency } from '../../../helpers'
     7→
     8→import {
     9→  OrderSummaryContainer,
    10→  BottomContainer,
    11→  CartItemsContainer,
    12→  StyledHeading,
    13→} from './OrderSummary.styles'
    14→
    15→type OrderSummaryProps = {
    16→  cartItems: CartItem[]
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const OrderSummary = ({ cartItems }: OrderSummaryProps) => {
    20→  const totalPrice = useMemo(
    21→    () => cartItems.map((item) => item.quantity * item.price).reduce((acc, next) => acc + next, 0),
    22→    [cartItems]
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <>
    26→      <OrderSummaryContainer>
    27→        <StyledHeading level={3} $withMargin>
    28→          Your order
    29→        </StyledHeading>
    30→        <CartItemsContainer>
    31→          {cartItems.length > 0 ? (
    32→            cartItems.map((item) => <ShoppingCartItem key={item.id} item={item} />)
    33→          ) : (
    34→            <Body>Your cart is empty.</Body>
    35→          )}
    36→        </CartItemsContainer>
    37→        <BottomContainer>
    38→          <Body>Total</Body>
    39→          <StyledHeading level={2}>{toCurrency(totalPrice)}</StyledHeading>
    40→        </BottomContainer>
    41→      </OrderSummaryContainer>
    42→    </>
    43→  )
    44→}

I'll also add a CssCheck story to the Button file since it has explicit background-color styling that maps to `color.buttonPrimary` from the base colors.

Actually, let me reconsider and use Badge instead—it's simpler with a straightforward background color that converts cleanly from hex to RGB format.

Now I'm mapping out the play functions for each component: Button needs a CSS check play to verify styles loaded plus a smoke test, Badge doesn't need plays, RestaurantCard and Review need plays to validate rendered content, Footer should check for link presence, ErrorBlock needs a button click interaction test, HeaderComponent should verify the cart button, and Input needs to confirm label and input association. I need to be strategic about which components actually benefit from play functions rather than adding them everywhere. I'm refining my criteria for what makes a play worthwhile—it needs to verify something the render alone can't prove, like aria attributes reflecting state, prop values rendered as text, async content, or portal mounting. For my components, that means keeping plays only for Button (CSS assertion), RestaurantCard (the "new" tag visibility), Review (formatted text output), ErrorBlock (button interaction), and HeaderComponent (cart button click).

Now I'm reconsidering the Button CssCheck more carefully. The issue is that Button uses styled-components for its own styles, not GlobalStyle, so checking the button's background won't prove GlobalStyle loaded. Instead, I should verify something GlobalStyle actually sets—like the `box-sizing` or `font-family` on a basic element—to confirm the global styles are applied correctly. the button element to confirm GlobalStyle is loaded, since that's a universal selector that should apply everywhere.

I'll use the Button story to verify the theme is working by checking that the background color matches the expected RGB value from the theme, then move on to writing out all the story files.

1→import { useCallback, useEffect, useState } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import type { Restaurant } from '../types'
     4→
     5→import { api } from './index'
     6→
     7→export const useFetchRestaurants = () => {
     8→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
     9→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    10→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    11→
    12→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    13→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    14→  }, [setRetry])
    15→
    16→  useEffect(() => {
    17→    setStatus('loading')
    18→
    19→    api
    20→      .getRestaurants()
    21→      .then((res) => {
    22→        setStatus('success')
    23→        setRestaurants(res)
    24→      })
    25→      .catch((error) => {
    26→        const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    27→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    28→      })
    29→  }, [retry])
    30→
    31→  return {
    32→    status,
    33→    restaurants,
    34→    retryRequest,
    35→  }
    36→}
    37→
    38→export const useFetchRestaurantsByCategory = (categoryId?: string) => {
    39→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    40→  const [restaurants, setRestaurants] = useState<Restaurant[]>([])
    41→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    42→
    43→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    44→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    45→  }, [setRetry])
    46→
    47→  useEffect(() => {
    48→    if (categoryId) {
    49→      setStatus('loading')
    50→
    51→      api
    52→        .getRestaurantsByCategory(categoryId)
    53→        .then((res) => {
    54→          setStatus('success')
    55→          setRestaurants(res)
    56→        })
    57→        .catch((error) => {
    58→          const statusCode = error?.response?.status || 500
    59→          setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    60→        })
    61→    }
    62→  }, [categoryId, retry])
    63→
    64→  return {
    65→    status,
    66→    restaurants,
    67→    retryRequest,
    68→  }
    69→}
    70→
    71→export const useFetchRestaurant = (id: string) => {
    72→  const [status, setStatus] = useState('idle')
    73→  const [restaurant, setRestaurant] = useState<Restaurant>()
    74→  const [retry, setRetry] = useState(false)
    75→
    76→  const retryRequest = useCallback(() => {
    77→    setRetry((prev) => !prev)
    78→  }, [setRetry])

    80→  useEffect(() => {

    91→        setStatus(statusCode.toString())
    92→      })
    93→  }, [id, retry])
    94→
    95→  return {
    96→    status,
    97→    restaurant,

1→import { useMemo } from 'react'
     2→
     3→import { ShoppingCartItem } from '../ShoppingCartItem/ShoppingCartItem'
     4→import { CartItem } from '../../../app-state/cart'
     5→import { Body } from '../../typography/Body'
     6→import { toCurrency } from '../../../helpers'
     7→
     8→import {
     9→  OrderSummaryContainer,
    10→  BottomContainer,
    11→  CartItemsContainer,
    12→  StyledHeading,
    13→} from './OrderSummary.styles'
    14→
    15→type OrderSummaryProps = {
    16→  cartItems: CartItem[]
    17→}
    18→
    19→export const OrderSummary = ({ cartItems }: OrderSummaryProps) => {
    20→  const totalPrice = useMemo(
    21→    () => cartItems.map((item) => item.quantity * item.price).reduce((acc, next) => acc + next, 0),
    22→    [cartItems]
    23→  )
    24→  return (
    25→    <>
    26→      <OrderSummaryContainer>
    27→        <StyledHeading level={3} $withMargin>
    28→          Your order
    29→        </StyledHeading>
    30→        <CartItemsContainer>
    31→          {cartItems.length > 0 ? (
    32→            cartItems.map((item) => <ShoppingCartItem key={item.id} item={item} />)
    33→          ) : (
    34→            <Body>Your cart is empty.</Body>
    35→          )}
    36→        </CartItemsContainer>
    37→        <BottomContainer>
    38→          <Body>Total</Body>
    39→          <StyledHeading level={2}>{toCurrency(totalPrice)}</StyledHeading>
    40→        </BottomContainer>
    41→      </OrderSummaryContainer>
    42→    </>
    43→  )
    44→}
